parameters.name: bounding_box
parameters.description: Spatial extent for Cropland Plain, Croatia

summary: Calculation of Leaf Area Index (LAI) using Sentinel-2 imagery with the OpenEO API.
description: Calculates Leaf Area Index (LAI) from Sentinel-2 L2A imagery using a neural network algorithm ported from SNAP.The LAI is quantified as one-sided leaf area per unit land area (m²/m²). Suitable for monitoringvegetation density across croplands, forests, and plantations.
